violations.claim: Temporal violation: approveOrder called twice on the same order object.
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P4
; LINE: 29
; Temporal violation: approveOrder called twice on the same order object.
; Second call changes approvedBy without any guard on current state.
(declare-const state_after_call1 Int)
(declare-const state_after_call2 Int)
(declare-const approver1_id Int)
(declare-const approver2_id Int)
(declare-const approvedBy_after_call1 Int)
(declare-const approvedBy_after_call2 Int)
; First call preconditions hold: order was submitted
; Code transition (call 1, line 27): state = approved (2)
(assert (= state_after_call1 2))
; Code transition (call 1, line 26): approvedBy = approver1
(assert (= approvedBy_after_call1 approver1_id))
; Second call: no guard checks that state_after_call1 != approved (2)
; Code transition (call 2, line 27): state = approved again (2)
(assert (= state_after_call2 2))
; Code transition (call 2, line 26): approvedBy overwritten with approver2
(assert (= approvedBy_after_call2 approver2_id))
; approver2 is a different identity than approver1
(assert (not (= approver2_id approver1_id)))
; Violation: approvedBy silently changed; VALID_TRANSITIONS[approved] excludes "approved"
(assert (= state_after_call1 2))
(assert (not (= approver1_id approver2_id)))
(check-sat)
